mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at AS createdAt, p.name AS petName, p.image_url AS profileImageUrl, opt.option_name AS optionName FROM `petlog`.review r JOIN `petlog`.users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN `petlog`.pets p ON u.id = p.user_id AND p.is_primary = true LEFT JOIN ( SELECT oi.option_id, o.user_id, oi.product_id FROM `petlog`.order_item oi JOIN `petlog`.`order` o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE (o.user_id, oi.product_id, o.created_at) IN ( SELECT o2.user_id, oi2.product_id, MAX(o2.created_at) FROM `petlog`.order_item oi2 JOIN `petlog`.`order` o2 ON oi2.order_id = o2.id GROUP BY o2.user_id, oi2.product_id ) ) latest_oi ON latest_oi.user_id = r.user_id AND latest_oi.product_id = r.product_id LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`option` opt ON latest_oi.option_id = opt.id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId}
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC ORDER BY r.rating ASC, r.created_at DESC ORDER BY r.rating DESC, r.created_at DESC
SELECT image_url FROM `petlog`.review_image WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT rating, COUNT(*) as count FROM petlog.review WHERE product_id = #{productId} GROUP BY rating ORDER BY rating DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO petlog.review (user_id, product_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{rating}, #{content})
INSERT INTO petlog.review_image (review_id, image_url, sort_order) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{imageUrl}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM petlog.review_image WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND image_url = #{imageUrl}
